special_mechanics.name: pinball_physics
special_mechanics.description: Sonic acts as a pinball within pinball machine-like environments. Movement is controlled via directional pad input for trajectory adjustment while airborne following flipper launches or bumper impacts.

physics_values.drain_mechanic: falls through drain to lose life

special_mechanics.name: directional_control_mid_air
special_mechanics.description: Player can use directional pad to maneuver Sonic while airborne for better positioning after bumper/flipper impacts or when descending toward drain.

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. No quantitative physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is pinball-focused rather than traditional platformer, so standard platformer movement values do not apply. Movement is governed by pinball physics (flipper velocity, bumper interactions, gravity on inclined surfaces).
